context: Tests whether the agent follows the skill's Phase 4b discipline (the failing test suite was already authored and approved in Phase 4a — tests_approved has been called), maps integration points before writing code, avoids unnecessary backward-compatibility scaffolding for unreleased code, and anchors changes in existing abstractions rather than creating parallel implementations.

checklist.name: Approved tests anchor each step
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md anchors each plan step in the already-approved failing test(s) from Phase 4a (e.g. 'locate the approved test for this step', 'the failing test from the approved suite drives this step') and does NOT instruct authoring new failing tests during implementation

checklist.name: Confirm test fails
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md includes a step to run the approved test and confirm it (still) fails before writing implementation code (e.g. 'run the test to confirm it fails', 'verify the test is red')

checklist.name: Minimum code to pass
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md describes writing the minimum code needed to make the failing test pass (e.g. 'write minimum code to pass', 'make the test green', not 'write the full implementation')

checklist.name: Confirm test passes after implementation
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md includes a step to run the test again after writing code and confirm it passes (e.g. 'run to confirm pass', 'verify green')

checklist.name: Grep for callers before changing
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md mentions grepping or searching for existing callers, usages, or integration points of the class/method being modified before making changes (e.g. 'grep for isAllowed', 'find callers of RateLimiter', 'map integration points')

checklist.name: Extend existing RateLimiter, not parallel class
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md describes extending or modifying the existing RateLimiter class (from inputs/rate-limiter.ts), NOT creating a separate parallel RateLimiter or BillingRateLimiter class

checklist.name: No backward compat shims
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md does NOT mention adding a backward compatibility layer, deprecation wrapper, dual code path, or keeping the old numeric-limit signature alongside the new RateLimitRule signature — since the code is unreleased

checklist.name: Reads file before modifying
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md mentions reading or reviewing the existing file contents before making changes for at least one step

checklist.name: Follows plan step order
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md works through the three plan steps in order (RateLimitRule VO → RateLimiter update → BillingService wiring), not in a different sequence

checklist.name: Refactor mentioned
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md mentions refactoring or cleaning up after the test passes (the 'refactor' step of red-green-refactor), even if brief

checklist.name: Refactor not deferred
checklist.description: implementation-guide.md performs the refactor in-place during this implementation and does NOT defer cleanup to a follow-up issue, a separate ticket, a TODO comment, or 'later' / 'a future PR'
